237 House Street door knocking Arriving 231 House Street door knocking Hi we are volunteering with Ground Truth We are just out here trying to have listening conversations with folks to learn what is important to them Just curious how you feel about the direction of the country Are we going in the right direction Are we on the wrong track What's that Tell me more Ok So a couple quick questions On a scale of 0 to 10 How do you feel about voting With 0 You don't care about voting And 10 means Voting is very important to you And 5 is neutral Ok And another question On a scale of 0 to 10 How aligned do you feel with one of the political parties With 10 being One of the parties 5 is Totally stands for what you need And believe And 0 is None of the parties stand for what you need or believe And 5 is You're sort of Conflicted about that What's that Ok So sort of between On a scale of 0 to 10 Which would you How aligned do you feel to one of the parties 5 And which party do you feel more aligned to Republican Ok So if you're a politician And you could change one thing to make your life better What would that be Any thoughts Ok Well thank you so much

vote for I don't even bother And transportation is a bad thing The only reason these are here right now Is because the family is over for dinner Or else I wouldn't have anybody here It's just me by gotcha It depends on who's actually And you kind of answered this next question But On a scale of zero to ten How aligned do you feel with one of the political parties With ten being There's one political party Who stands who totally stands For what you need and believe None of them Zero is none of them OK Yeah so if you were A politician and you could do one thing To make your life better What would that be Helping the homeless Helping the homeless Getting more places for them to stay and live and eat You know how many children I've seen when I was staying in the projects That their parents leave the house and leave their children Locked out of the house all day all night Until they get home They don't eat drink or nothing Oh that's terrible That's terrible And then the thing about it is that they'll sit there And they'll dress their kids up in pretty little clothes When they're going out in public or when they're going to school But when they're sitting at home They have absolutely nothing Oh wow Oh that's hard I'd help the families that need help Food and shelter for those that need it I mean during the summer it's OK Because you know you can sleep outside it's nice outside When it's freezing outside it's ridiculous And when you've got children it's ten times worse Right right I've been homeless And I'm glad I was never homeless with my children Yeah So I hear you saying that politicians Should help the homeless And make sure everybody has a place to stay And the kids get fed I don't remember which president did it But there was one of the presidents Who made sure that the Families and the kids At school came home with food They did a project They did something Where they took book bags home for the weekend For the kids that needed food Through the weekend so that way they had food So the families that didn't have food Had food and the ones that did Have extra it doesn't matter As long as you have food and the kids are eating Because not every family is going to walk up in there and go Hey look we ain't got no food for the kids Nobody's going to do that everybody's too proud to do that So they used to do the project The things where they used to send the children Of all ages Home with book bags with food in it And I don't know what the hell happened to it Well now my kids are not in school anymore But I still don't see them doing it anymore I see the neighborhood kids around here coming home And I don't see them I'm sorry So I'd like to pass that along To Sherry Brown's office And in order to do that I just need your name Cindy Cindy C Y N D I E Okay I bet you get that misspelled Every different way Every different way And your last name Montanez M O N T A N E Z And your phone number 440 308 4785 And what I'm going to do is I'm going to send you a text Hopefully tonight If I'm not too tired And with what I'm going to send on to Sherry Brown And I just need you to say yes You have permission to You can just like it Anything like that And for other people I have help aid and stuff like that But the amount of money they're giving us With the prices that the food is Is not enough And the only place that does food Is you have to have a vehicle And you have to go on a certain day In the vehicle pick up food and come back Not all the time can I do that Not everybody exactly Not everybody has a vehicle So I'm unable to do that too So there's times that I need food And there's no way for me to get to said food bank To get food and stuff There's a lot of elderly that I see around here That I know for a fact are not eating And they don't say anything And when mom was around We would sit there and we'd see them walking And sometimes we'd be like Would you like some No no no no take some home with you No don't play that bullshit You can sit there and say that you're not hungry But I can see that you're hungry You're constantly walking up and down the street And you're not inside your house And they don't know that there's places that you can call But you call those places And those places are like We have to wait until somebody passes Or until somebody is no longer needing it Because we don't have enough How the hell do we not have enough food for the elderly bro Yeah and that's terrible That's terrible Yeah I hear you saying that There are a lot of people who are too proud to ask Exactly And we shouldn't be messing with people's pride And but they But they still need support Everybody does no matter if they sit there And say they don't Like I said I'm living in a house yes But I am on section 8 I am struggling to pay my bills And I'm struggling with food and stuff like that I'm not too proud to say that I'm struggling But I'll be damned if I'm going to sit there and see somebody else Struggling more than me and I'm not going to help I will give you the clothes off my back If I could To make sure that you and your family is okay That's how much I am able to Because I don't have an issue with hand me downs Other people do they'll be like Oh you know my kids grew out of this would you like it And they'll be like uh why would I want that Because your kids ain't got no clothes But hey that's okay you don't want it I'll go back inside the house with my clothes You see the other kids going wait no wait What you got in there I just put the bag down on the porch Pick out whatever you want whatever you're going to wear Whatever you think you're going to wear take it Whatever you don't just leave it right there And I'll fold it back up and give it to somebody else Sure enough they took the bags in the house and stuff And I'm like I don't understand how you can sit there and be too proud But I'm like why would I want your hand me downs Because they're still good clothes they just don't fit It's not like I'm sitting there going Here you want my tore up shit they got holes in it But hey no I'm not doing that I'm giving you good clothes that don't fit Yeah yeah well that's a very That's a wonderful thing that you do I've been here 13 dang years Mmm yeah 13 freaking years in this house That's the first time I've actually been in the house that damn long But yeah I see a lot of stuff I see a lot of people struggling And people too proud to ask for help And people sitting there putting their nose up But won't sit there and you know refuse it They'll say no but they'll still take it you know what I'm saying I just I can't It's good on you for getting your life together Since you can actually not just take care of yourself You can actually help other people I'm needing help now my freaking body is falling apart On my ass I can't do stuff like I used to I used to like to take walks with the dog like she does Me and Snowball used to go around the neighborhood Go two three blocks down all the way to freaking McDonald's and come all the way back Just to take a walk I can't even make it to the corner Without passing out So Snowball was your dog Yeah Snowball's mine he's the Dalmatian Pit Bull Dalmatian Pit Bull The all white one Yeah so I'm going to send you a text tonight No problem And what are you going to do when you get that text Say messing with people's pride And but they But they still need support Everybody does no matter if they sit there And say they don't Like I said I'm living in a house yes But I am on section 8 I am struggling to pay my bills And I'm struggling with food and stuff like that I'm not too proud to say that I'm struggling But I'll be damned if I'm going to sit there and see somebody else Struggling more than me and I'm not going to help I will give you the clothes off my back If I could To make sure that you and your family is okay That's how much I am able to Because I don't have an issue with hand me downs Other people do they'll be like Oh you know my kids grew out of this would you like it And they'll be like uh why would I want that Because your kids ain't got no clothes But hey that's okay you don't want it I'll go back inside the house with my clothes You see the other kids going wait no wait What you got in there I just put the bag down on the porch Pick out whatever you want whatever you're going to wear Whatever you think you're going to wear take it Whatever you don't just leave it right there And I'll fold it back up and give it to somebody else Sure enough they took the bags in the house and stuff And I'm like I don't understand how you can sit there and be too proud But I'm like why would I want your hand me downs Because they're still good clothes they just don't fit It's not like I'm sitting there going Here you want my tore up shit they got holes in it But hey no I'm not doing that I'm giving you good clothes that don't fit Yeah yeah well that's a very That's a wonderful thing that you do I've been here 13 dang years Mmm yeah 13 freaking years in this house That's the first time I've actually been in the house that damn long But yeah I see a lot of stuff I see a lot of people struggling And people too proud to ask for help And people sitting there putting their nose up But won't sit there and you know refuse it They'll say no but they'll still take it you know what I'm saying I just I can't It's good on you for getting your life together Since you can actually not just take care of yourself You can actually help other people I'm needing help now my freaking body is falling apart On my ass I can't do stuff like I used to I used to like to take walks with the dog like she does Me and Snowball used to go around the neighborhood Go two three blocks down all the way to freaking McDonald's and come all the way back Just to take a walk I can't even make it to the corner Without passing out So Snowball was your dog Yeah Snowball's mine he's the Dalmatian Pit Bull Dalmatian Pit Bull The all white one Yeah so I'm going to send you a text tonight No problem And what are you going to do when you get that text Say yes Thank you so much transportation is a bad thing The only reason these are here right now Is because the family is over for dinner Or else I wouldn't have anybody here It's just me by myself With my one baby That's why And you kind of answered this next question But On a scale of zero to ten How aligned do you feel with one of the political parties With ten being There's one political party Who stands who totally stands For what you need and believe None of them Zero is none of them OK Yeah so if you were A politician and you could do one thing To make your life better What would that be Helping the homeless Helping the homeless Getting more places for them to stay and live and eat You know how many children I've seen when I was staying in the projects That their parents leave the house and leave their children Locked out of the house all day all night Until they get home They don't eat drink or nothing Oh that's terrible That's terrible And then the thing about it is that they'll sit there And they'll dress their kids up in pretty little clothes When they're going out in public or when they're going to school But when they're sitting at home They have absolutely nothing Oh wow Oh that's hard I'd help the families that need help Food and shelter for those that need it I mean during the summer it's OK Because you know you can sleep outside it's nice outside When it's freezing outside it's ridiculous And when you've got children it's ten times worse Right right I've been homeless And I'm glad I was never homeless with my children Yeah So I hear you saying that politicians Should help the homeless And make sure everybody has a place to stay And the kids get fed I don't remember which president did it But there was one of the presidents Who made sure that the Families and the kids At school came home with food They did a project They did something Where they took book bags home for the weekend For the kids that needed food Through the weekend so that way they had food So the families that didn't have food Had food and the ones that did Have extra it doesn't matter As long as you have food and the kids are eating Because not every family is going to walk up in there and go Hey look we ain't got no food for the kids Nobody's going to do that everybody's too proud to do that So they used to do the project The things where they used to send the children Of all ages Home with book bags with food in it And I don't know what the hell happened to it Well now my kids are not in school anymore But I still don't see them doing it anymore I see the neighborhood kids around here coming home And I don't see them I'm sorry So I'd like to pass that along To Sherry Brown's office And in order to do that I just need your name Cindy Cindy C Y N D I E Okay I bet you get that misspelled Every different way Every different way And your last name Montanez M O N T A N E Z And your phone number 440 308 4785 And what I'm going to do is I'm going to send you a text Hopefully tonight If I'm not too tired And with what I'm going to send on to Sherry Brown And I just need you to say yes You have permission to You can just like it Anything like that And for other people I have help aid and stuff like that But the amount of money they're giving us With the prices that the food is Is not enough And the only place that does food Is you have to have a vehicle And you have to go on a certain day In the vehicle pick up food and come back Not all the time can I do that Not everybody exactly Not everybody has a vehicle So I'm unable to do that too So there's times that I need food And there's no way for me to get to said food bank To get food and stuff There's a lot of elderly that I see around here That I know for a fact are not eating And they don't say anything And when mom was around We would sit there and we'd see them walking And sometimes we'd be like Would you like some No no no no take some home with you No don't play that bullshit You can sit there and say that you're not hungry But I can see that you're hungry You're constantly walking up and down the street And you're not inside your house And they don't know that there's places that you can call But you call those places And those places are like We have to wait until somebody passes Or until somebody is no longer needing it Because we don't have enough How the hell do we not have None of them Zero is none of them OK Yeah so if you were A politician and you could do one thing To make your life better What would that be Helping the homeless Helping the homeless Getting more places for them to stay and live and eat You know how many children I've seen when I was staying in the projects That their parents leave the house and leave their children Locked out of the house all day all night Until they get home They don't eat drink or nothing Oh that's terrible That's terrible And then the thing about it is that they'll sit there And they'll dress their kids up in pretty little clothes When they're going out in public or when they're going to school But when they're sitting at home They have absolutely nothing Oh wow Oh that's hard I'd help the families that need help Food and shelter for those that need it I mean during the summer it's OK Because you know you can sleep outside it's nice outside When it's freezing outside it's ridiculous And when you've got children it's ten times worse Right right I've been homeless And I'm glad I was never homeless with my children Yeah So I hear you saying that politicians Should help the homeless And make sure everybody has a place to stay And the kids get fed I don't remember which president did it But there was one of the presidents Who made sure that the Families and the kids At school came home with food They did a project They did something Where they took book bags home for the weekend For the kids that needed food Through the weekend so that way they had food So the families that didn't have food Had food and the ones that did Have extra it doesn't matter As long as you have food and the kids are eating Because not every family is going to walk up in there and go Hey look we ain't got no food for the kids Nobody's going to do that everybody's too proud to do that So they used to do the project The things where they used to send the children Of all ages Home with book bags with food in it And I don't know what the hell happened to it Well now my kids are not in school anymore But I still don't see them doing it anymore I see the neighborhood kids around here coming home And I don't see them I'm sorry So I'd like to pass that along To Sherry Brown's office And in order to do that I just need your name Cindy Cindy C Y N D I E Okay I bet you get that misspelled Every different way Every different way And your last name Montanez M O N T A N E Z And your phone number 440 308 4785 And what I'm going to do is I'm going to send you a text Hopefully tonight If I'm not too tired And with what I'm going to send on to Sherry Brown And I just need you to say yes You have permission to You can just like it Anything like that And for other people I have help aid and stuff like that But the amount of money they're giving us With the prices that the food is Is not enough And the only place that does food Is you have to have a vehicle And you have to go on a certain day In the vehicle pick up food and come back Not all the time can I do that Not everybody exactly Not everybody has a vehicle So I'm unable to do that too So there's times that I need food And there's no way for me to get to said food bank To get food and stuff There's a lot of elderly that I see around here That I know for a fact are not eating And they don't say anything And when mom was around We would sit there and we'd see them walking And sometimes we'd be like Would you like some No no no no take some home with you No don't play that bullshit You can sit there and say that you're not hungry But I can see that you're hungry You're constantly walking up and down the street And you're not inside your house And they don't know that there's places that you can call But you call those places And those places are like We have to wait until somebody passes Or until somebody is no longer needing it Because we don't have enough How the hell do we not have enough food for the elderly bro Yeah and that's terrible That's terrible Yeah I hear you saying that There are a lot of people who are too proud to ask Exactly And we shouldn't be messing with people's pride And but they But they still need support Everybody does no matter if they sit there And say they don't Like I said I'm living in a house yes But I am on section 8 I am struggling to pay my bills And I'm struggling with food and stuff like that I'm not too proud to say that I'm struggling But I'll be damned if I'm going to sit there and see somebody else Struggling more than me and I'm not going to help I will give you the clothes off my back If I could To make sure that you and your family is okay That's how much I am able to Because I don't have an issue with hand me downs Other people do they'll be like Oh you know my kids grew out of this would you like it And they'll be like uh why would I want that Because your kids ain't got no clothes But hey that's okay you don't want it I'll go back inside the house with my clothes You see the other kids going wait no wait What you got in there I just put the bag down on the porch Pick out whatever you want whatever you're going to wear Whatever you think you're going to wear take it Whatever you don't just leave it right there And I'll fold it back up and give it to somebody else Sure enough they took the bags in the house and stuff And I'm like I don't understand how you can sit there and be too proud But I'm like why would I want your hand me downs Because they're still good clothes they just don't fit It's not like I'm sitting there going Here you want my tore up shit they got holes in it But hey no I'm not doing that I'm giving you good clothes that don't fit Yeah yeah well that's a very That's a wonderful thing that you do I've been here 13 dang years Mmm yeah 13 freaking years in this house That's the first time I've actually been in the house that damn long But yeah I see a lot of stuff I see a lot of people struggling And people too proud to ask for help And people sitting there putting their nose up But won't sit there and you know refuse it They'll say no but they'll still take it you know what I'm saying I just I can't It's good on you for getting your life together Since you can actually not just take care of yourself You can actually help other people I'm needing help now my freaking body is falling apart On my ass I can't do stuff like I used to I used to like to take walks with the dog like she does Me and Snowball used to go around the neighborhood Go two three blocks down all the way to freaking McDonald's and come all the way back Just to take a walk I can't even make it to the corner Without passing out So Snowball was your dog Yeah Snowball's mine he's the Dalmatian Pit Bull Dalmatian Pit Bull The all white one Yeah so I'm going to send you a text tonight No problem And what are you going to do when you get that text Say yes Thank you so much You too thank you so much for taking the time

don't care about voting And ten being I don't vote On a scale of zero to ten Where would you put yourself Zero And another question On a scale of zero to ten How aligned do you feel with one of the political parties Ten being you feel like one of the political parties Totally stands For your needs And Zero means Neither political party Stands for What you need Honestly I don't even know I can't even tell you One last question If you're a politician If you could do one If you could get a politician to do one thing To make your life better What would that be Cut down on some of those Bills Like Cut down on the groceries Cut down on the grocery prices Our bill prices Like Give us more money That's about it For real I feel like I'm in survival mode I feel like we shouldn't even have to be in survival mode I feel like it should be a smooth But They gonna do what they do I mean it's a good thing you're going around Doing this but I just don't get into all that For real it's not What I'm hearing you say Is that prices are too high And that you need more money That you're in survival mode Yeah So I would like to
